vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm mở hộp sản phẩm
vocab.example: The unboxing experience was truly memorable, as the watch was encased in a beautiful mahogany box.

vocab.meaning: ý nghĩa mang tính biểu tượng
vocab.example: To me, the watch carries a symbolic significance of moving into a new chapter of adulthood.

vocab.meaning: một sự bất ngờ ngoài mong đợi
vocab.example: It was an unexpected surprise when my brother presented me with a vintage timepiece for my birthday.

vocab.meaning: duy trì/tiếp nối một di sản
vocab.example: Receiving my father's old watch felt like a way to perpetuate a legacy within our family.

vocab.meaning: phần chạm khắc theo yêu cầu
vocab.example: The watch features a customized engraving on the back with my initials and the date I graduated.

vocab.meaning: món quà chân thành, từ tận đáy lòng
vocab.example: It was such a heartfelt gift that I couldn't help but feel a bit emotional when I first put it on.

vocab.meaning: ấn tượng sâu đậm, khó quên
vocab.example: The elegance of the watch made a lasting impression on me, sparking my interest in horology.

vocab.meaning: vật kỷ niệm có giá trị sử dụng
vocab.example: I prefer gifts like this watch because it serves as a functional memento that I can use every day.

vocab.meaning: thể hiện tình cảm sâu sắc
vocab.example: The effort they put into choosing a watch that perfectly matched my style really showcased their deep affection.
Since that day, the watch has become a treasured possession that I only wear on the most special occasions.
